session_d_pointers.description: G0021 agalliao (to rejoice greatly, 75 occ, 11 verses, 15%). Phase 2 research required.

G6110 agalliama has 12 occurrences (STEP) but 0 verse records in current export. LXX-only term; relevant to NT joy vocabulary's Septuagintal roots. Phase 2 independent research required before any synthesis-level conclusions drawn from this term's absence.
G3166 megalaucheō, 3 occurrences (STEP), 0 verse records in export. Thin data term; boasting/braggery register, peripheral to joy analysis but flagged for completeness.

G4862 is the Greek preposition sun (with), occ=278. Its presence in registry 097 is anomalous — likely STEP sub-gloss contamination from compound joy terms (e.g. sunchairō G4796). 99 verse records in export. Claude Code investigation required to determine correct disposition of these verse records.
